mapper.select: SELECT am.id, am.alert_id, a.alert_name, a.alert_level, am.news_id, n.title, n.content, n.source_url, am.longitude, am.latitude, am.alert_date FROM alert_map am LEFT JOIN special_alert_setting a ON am.alert_id = a.alert_id LEFT JOIN news_data n ON am.news_id = n.news_id ORDER BY am.alert_date DESC

SELECT am.id, am.alert_id, a.alert_name, a.alert_level, am.news_id, n.title, n.content, n.source_url, am.longitude, am.latitude, am.alert_date FROM alert_map am LEFT JOIN special_alert_setting a ON am.alert_id = a.alert_id LEFT JOIN news_data n ON am.news_id = n.news_id WHERE am.alert_id = #{alertId} ORDER BY am.alert_date DESC

SELECT am.id, am.alert_id, a.alert_name, a.alert_level, am.news_id, n.title, n.content, n.source_url, am.longitude, am.latitude, am.alert_date FROM alert_map am LEFT JOIN special_alert_setting a ON am.alert_id = a.alert_id LEFT JOIN news_data n ON am.news_id = n.news_id WHERE 1=1
AND DATE(am.alert_date) = CURDATE()
AND am.alert_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
AND am.alert_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
ORDER BY am.alert_date DESC
